---
title: "To be determined"
format: 
  revealjs:
    slide-number: true
    embed-resources: true
editor: source
---

## Research perspectives, 1

-   Positivism
-   Constructivism

## Research perspectives, 2

-   Theoretical
-   Applied

## Research perspectives, 3

-   Translational
-   Basic

## Research perspectives, 4

-   Laboratory
-   Field

::: notes

:::
